---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who would benefit from it?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why do you prefer this one?

## Affected component(s)

- [ ] Daemon (`homerund`)
- [ ] TUI / CLI (`homerun`)
- [ ] Desktop app (Tauri)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Additional context

Any mockups, examples, or links to relevant prior art.
